competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 萨内 进球，维尔茨 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Jamal Musiala (Germany) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by David Raum (Germany).
Foul by Nilson Angulo (Ecuador).
Joshua Kimmich (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt blocked. Florian Wirtz (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Enner Valencia (Ecuador) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Jamal Musiala (Germany).

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 尼尔森·安古罗 进球，佩德罗·维特 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Felix Nmecha (Germany) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Joshua Kimmich (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Felix Nmecha (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the left. Assisted by Jamal Musiala.

events.description: 菲利克斯·恩梅查射门偏出。 穆西亚拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Aleksandar Pavlovic (Germany) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Aleksandar Pavlovic (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Joshua Kimmich (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Jamal Musiala (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Joshua Kimmich.
Attempt saved. Kai Havertz (Germany) header from the centre of the box is saved in the top left corner by Hernán Galíndez (Ecuador). Assisted by David Raum with a cross.

events.description: 哈弗茨射正。 大卫·劳姆参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt blocked. Enner Valencia (Ecuador) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Nilson Angulo.

events.description: 恩纳·瓦伦西亚射门被封堵。 尼尔森·安古罗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Jamal Musiala (Germany) left footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Florian Wirtz.

events.description: 穆西亚拉射门被封堵。 维尔茨参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Germany. Conceded by Joel Ordóñez.
Attempt blocked. Felix Nmecha (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Leroy Sané.

events.description: 菲利克斯·恩梅查射门被封堵。 萨内参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match (Germany).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 皮耶罗·欣卡皮 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Leroy Sané (Germany) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 亚历山大·巴甫洛维奇 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Aleksandar Pavlovic (Germany).

events.description: 亚历山大·巴甫洛维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Florian Wirtz (Germany) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by David Raum with a cross.

events.description: 维尔茨射门被封堵。 大卫·劳姆参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Ecuador 1, Germany 1.

events.description: 安杰洛·斯蒂勒 登场，亚历山大·巴甫洛维奇 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Ecuador 1, Germany 1.
Foul by Leroy Sané (Germany).
VAR Decision: No Penalty Germany.
Foul by David Raum (Germany).
Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Antonio Rüdiger.
Attempt missed. Moisés Caicedo (Ecuador) header from a difficult angle on the left is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by John Yeboah with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 莫伊塞斯·凯塞多射门偏出。 约翰·耶博参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jonathan Tah (Germany).
Jamal Musiala (Germany) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Leroy Sané (Germany).

events.description: 翁达夫 登场，哈弗茨 离场
马利克·蒂奥 登场，基米希 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Enner Valencia (Ecuador) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Manuel Neuer (Germany). Assisted by John Yeboah.

events.description: 恩纳·瓦伦西亚射正。 约翰·耶博参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Florian Wirtz (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Deniz Undav.

events.description: 维尔茨射门被封堵。 翁达夫参与进攻。
安杰洛·普雷西亚多 登场，艾伦·弗兰科 离场
凯文·罗德里格斯 登场，恩纳·瓦伦西亚 离场
马克西米利安·贝尔 登场，菲利克斯·恩梅查 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Malick Thiaw (Germany).
Delay in match for a drinks break.

events.description: 佩维斯·埃斯图皮南 登场，皮耶罗·欣卡皮 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 帕斯卡·格罗斯 登场，维尔茨 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Gonzalo Plata (Ecuador) left footed shot from very close range is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Moisés Caicedo.

events.description: 贡萨洛·普拉塔射门偏出。 莫伊塞斯·凯塞多参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Gonzalo Plata (Ecuador).
Attempt saved. Leroy Sané (Germany) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Hernán Galíndez (Ecuador). Assisted by Deniz Undav.

events.description: 萨内射正。 翁达夫参与进攻。

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 贡萨洛·普拉塔 进球，凯文·罗德里格斯 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Kevin Rodríguez (Ecuador) left footed shot from very close range is blocked. Assisted by John Yeboah with a headed pass.

events.description: 凯文·罗德里格斯射门被封堵。 约翰·耶博参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Angelo Stiller.
Foul by Maximilian Beier (Germany).

events.description: 马克西米利安·贝尔犯规。
乔迪·凯塞多 登场，尼尔森·安古罗 离场
菲利克斯·托雷斯 登场，约翰·耶博 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Kevin Rodríguez (Ecuador).
Malick Thiaw (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Maximilian Beier (Germany) wins a free kick on the right wing.

events.description: 佩维斯·埃斯图皮南犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Germany. Conceded by Pervis Estupiñán.

events.description: 贡萨洛·普拉塔 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Jamal Musiala (Germany) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt missed. Deniz Undav (Germany) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Pascal Groß.

events.description: 翁达夫射门偏出。 帕斯卡·格罗斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Pascal Groß (Germany) left footed shot from outside the box is too high.

events.description: 帕斯卡·格罗斯射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Pascal Groß (Germany).
Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时7分钟。

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。
